canonical_name: a man who had lain in my arms and I had sworn to love
the shores of the alien Lake
a simple old woman long past such thoughts
the child who came here many years ago
a priestess who knew the secret way through the mists
that wicked sorceress who is mother to one of them
the only other child fostered here
one more of the king's unregarded bastards
a child of the Great Marriage
a priestess under vows of silence
tiresome children who were reared or sent to fosterage as the Lady decreed
the old priestess who had schooled her
the silent servants of the barge
the land of the fairy folk
those who hurry to fetch and carry, and hang trembling on her every word
a world where men do not come and go at a woman's beckoning
a stem Goddess whose every breath bids men live and die at her will
a petitioner to her underworld shrine
the austere dwelling of the priestesses
the Druid who gave me that name
